features.title: Key Features

performance.title: Superior Performance
performance.description: Global CDN with intelligent caching for minimum load times.

security.title: Integrated Security
security.description: Free SSL, firewall, and DDoS protection.

scalability.title: Infinite Scalability
scalability.description: Automatically scales with your application traffic.

hosting.title: Professional Hosting
hosting.subtitle: Deploy your Angular application in minutes with our optimized configuration.

step1.title: Configure your project
step1.description: Install Firebase CLI and run firebase init to configure your project.

step2.title: Build your application
step2.description: Use npm run build:firebase to generate production files.

step3.title: Deploy to Firebase
step3.description: Run firebase deploy and your application will be online instantly.
